name: Frekil
long_description:
Today, it takes months to understand how drugs perform in the real world, delaying safety insights, slowing approvals, and costing lives. Frekil turns that months-long process into minutes, with full auditability and scientific rigor.

Frekil accelerates real world evidence (RWE) generation for life sciences companies from months to minutes. It connects to fragmented clinical data (EHR, Claims, etc.), harmonizes it, and lets teams run end-to-end studies from cohort design to SAP, statistical analysis, and final reports.
one_liner: Accelerate Real World Evidence (RWE) Generation from months to minutes
